title: The One with Ross's Teeth

jokes.text: Hi, my name's Chandler. I just moved in next door. Would you like to battle me in a post-apocalyptic world for control of the galaxy's last remaining energy source?
jokes.setup: Chandler introduces himself as a new neighbor in what seems like a normal social interaction
jokes.punchline: Instead of normal neighbor small talk, he immediately invites Joey to play an elaborate sci-fi video game
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection from normal to absurd, perfect Chandler character voice with his awkward over-specificity

jokes.text: Oh, my God. It's like a guy never lived in here.
jokes.setup: Chandler enters Joey's feminized apartment
jokes.punchline: His horrified reaction to how girlie everything has become
jokes.explanation: Sets up the apartment feminization conflict well, economical delivery

jokes.text: You gotta be careful. This girl thing is dangerous. It's spreading.
jokes.setup: Joey's apartment has feminine decorations
jokes.punchline: Chandler treats femininity like a contagious disease
jokes.explanation: Funny metaphor treating gender expression as an infection, good Chandler neurosis

jokes.text: Is this your pretty pink pillow on the couch?
jokes.setup: Chandler is trying to prove Joey is becoming too feminine
jokes.punchline: His disgusted/horrified tone while describing a harmless decorative pillow
jokes.explanation: Builds the gag but fairly predictable masculine anxiety humor

jokes.text: Is that your tiny little box that's too small to put anything in?
jokes.setup: Chandler continues cataloguing feminine items
jokes.punchline: His frustrated description of a decorative box that serves no practical purpose
jokes.explanation: Good specific observation about decorative vs functional items

jokes.text: Soon, you'll be soaking your fingers in stuff.
jokes.setup: Chandler warns Joey about becoming too feminine
jokes.punchline: Vague but ominous prediction about nail care/spa treatments
jokes.explanation: Funny vague threat, good escalation of the femininity panic

jokes.text: We have to hem the new dust ruffle. Be right there, sweetums.
jokes.setup: Joey has just declared he'll be a man and defend himself
jokes.punchline: Immediately abandons that to help with extremely feminine domestic task using pet name
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic timing and character contradiction, great setup/payoff structure

jokes.text: Totally different situation.
jokes.setup: Joey just completely undermined his masculine declaration
jokes.punchline: Chandler's deadpan acknowledgment that Joey has already lost the battle
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan reaction, maximum comedy with minimal words

jokes.text: Is this Hillary, your hot assistant chef, Hillary?
jokes.setup: Monica mentions Hillary is depressed about her breakup
jokes.punchline: Joey immediately focuses only on whether this is the hot one he's interested in
jokes.explanation: Classic Joey horndog behavior, predictable but in character

jokes.text: No. The one who looked at you once because you got in her way.
jokes.setup: Joey claims Hillary stares at him and is into him
jokes.punchline: Monica deflates his delusion with the mundane reality
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of Joey's ego, economical and specific

jokes.text: Still, I could tell. She was into me.
jokes.setup: Monica just explained Hillary barely noticed Joey
jokes.punchline: Joey completely ignores reality and maintains his delusion
jokes.explanation: Classic Joey obliviousness, predictable but character-consistent

jokes.text: Does she have a wedding dress?
jokes.setup: Monica asks if they're setting Ross up with someone
jokes.punchline: Phoebe immediately references Ross's history of failed marriages
jokes.explanation: Sharp callback to Ross's marriage failures, very economical

jokes.text: Well, sure, but they might think it's weird considering I don't work there anymore.
jokes.setup: Phoebe asks to use the copy machine at Bloomingdale's
jokes.punchline: Rachel reveals she no longer works there, making the request impossible
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection, sets up the revelation structure

jokes.text: A year ago.
jokes.setup: Monica congratulates Rachel on getting the Ralph Lauren job
jokes.punchline: Rachel reveals it's been a year, making Monica's congratulations awkwardly late
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic timing reveal, creates maximum awkwardness with minimal words

jokes.text: You've lasted all year. Good for you.
jokes.setup: Monica is embarrassed about being a year late with congratulations
jokes.punchline: Her awkward attempt to reframe her lateness as a different kind of congratulation
jokes.explanation: Good awkward recovery attempt, extends the discomfort nicely

jokes.text: Or maybe because you're all hanging around here at 11:30 on a Wednesday.
jokes.setup: Everyone wonders why their bosses don't like them
jokes.punchline: Chandler points out they're all slacking off during work hours
jokes.explanation: Sharp observation about their work ethic, good reality check moment

jokes.text: Yeah, let's head off to work.
jokes.setup: Chandler just called out everyone for not working
jokes.punchline: He immediately suggests they should leave for work, revealing his own hypocrisy
jokes.explanation: Nice self-aware moment showing Chandler's hypocrisy

jokes.text: Good kisser. - What? What? - You kissed him? - Totally.
jokes.setup: Phoebe casually mentions Ralph Lauren seems nice
jokes.punchline: She drops that she kissed him like it's no big deal
jokes.explanation: Good escalation and classic Phoebe casual attitude toward shocking behavior

jokes.text: What am I supposed to do, ask every guy I make out with if he's married? No, yeah, I should.
jokes.setup: Phoebe learns Ralph Lauren is married
jokes.punchline: She sarcastically asks if she should check marriage status, then immediately realizes she actually should
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe moment - starts defensive then has genuine realization

jokes.text: No. I just thought it was cute. Yeah, that's what I was afraid of.
jokes.setup: Chandler asks if Joey knows the baby in the picture
jokes.punchline: Joey admits he just likes random cute baby photos, confirming Chandler's fears about feminization
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Joey's softer side conflicting with masculine expectations

jokes.text: I don't know this baby. I don't know if she's a famous artist or not.
jokes.setup: Janine explains it's an Anne Geddes photo
jokes.punchline: Joey misunderstands and thinks the baby might be the famous artist
jokes.explanation: Classic Joey misunderstanding, perfectly in character and absurd

jokes.text: You know, you got the candles and the 'foofy schmoofer' thing here.
jokes.setup: Joey is trying to articulate his problems with the feminine decor
jokes.punchline: He can't even name the decorative items, inventing nonsense words
jokes.explanation: Funny made-up word that perfectly captures Joey's masculine discomfort with feminine things

jokes.text: I'm sure it's a famous watering can.
jokes.setup: Joey just confused baby Anne Geddes for an artist
jokes.punchline: He now assumes every decorative item must be by a famous artist
jokes.explanation: Nice callback that shows Joey learning the wrong lesson from his mistake

jokes.text: And what is with the really hot stick in the bathroom?
jokes.setup: Joey is complaining about feminine items
jokes.punchline: His description of a curling iron as a 'really hot stick' shows his unfamiliarity
jokes.explanation: Funny masculine perspective on feminine grooming tools

jokes.text: Oh. Well, that's okay then.
jokes.setup: Joey was upset about the 'really hot stick'
jokes.punchline: Once he learns it's a curling iron, he immediately accepts it as normal
jokes.explanation: Shows Joey's arbitrary standards about what's acceptably feminine

jokes.text: It's clean. - Yeah, well, it feels different. It's dry.
jokes.setup: Joey complains his towels smell different
jokes.punchline: Janine reveals they're clean and dry, basic hygiene Joey apparently lacks
jokes.explanation: Good revelation of Joey's questionable hygiene standards

jokes.text: Well, that's like summer in a bowl.
jokes.setup: Janine explains potpourri is for smelling, not eating
jokes.punchline: Joey's poetic appreciation after nearly eating it
jokes.explanation: Unexpectedly poetic line from Joey, great contrast to his usual simplicity

jokes.text: I didn't read it.
jokes.setup: Rachel asks what Kim thought of her marketing report
jokes.punchline: Kim bluntly admits she didn't bother reading it
jokes.explanation: Brutally honest workplace dynamics, maximum awkwardness with minimal words

jokes.text: Yeah.
jokes.setup: Rachel tries to make small talk about the spring line
jokes.punchline: Kim's completely uninterested one-word response
jokes.explanation: Awkward workplace dynamics, shows Kim's total disinterest in Rachel

jokes.text: Tell me everything.
jokes.setup: Kim has been cold and dismissive to Rachel
jokes.punchline: She completely perks up at the mention of Ralph Lauren gossip
jokes.explanation: Good character turn showing Kim's priority shift when gossip is involved

jokes.text: I whitened them.
jokes.setup: Everyone reacts in horror to Ross's teeth
jokes.punchline: Ross proudly explains he whitened them, missing how bad they look
jokes.explanation: Sets up the visual gag well, Ross's obliviousness to his appearance

jokes.text: I think I shouldn't look directly at them.
jokes.setup: Ross asks what Chandler thinks of his whitened teeth
jokes.punchline: Chandler treats them like looking at the sun - dangerous to view directly
jokes.explanation: Excellent metaphor comparing teeth to solar eclipse, perfectly delivered

jokes.text: What was wrong with your old human teeth?
jokes.setup: Ross has extremely white teeth
jokes.punchline: Monica implies his teeth now look inhuman
jokes.explanation: Great escalation suggesting the teeth look alien, good specificity

jokes.text: How much longer? - A day.
jokes.setup: Monica asks how much longer Ross left the whitening gel on than recommended
jokes.punchline: Ross casually admits he left it on for an entire extra day
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation revealing the absurd extent of Ross's mistake

jokes.text: You'll be fine. Hillary's blind, right?
jokes.setup: Ross asks if his teeth are really that bad for his date
jokes.punchline: Monica sarcastically suggests his only hope is if his date can't see
jokes.explanation: Dark but funny suggestion, good sibling teasing

jokes.text: She will be after tonight.
jokes.setup: Monica jokes about Hillary being blind
jokes.punchline: Chandler suggests Ross's teeth will blind her
jokes.explanation: Nice escalation and callback to the solar eclipse metaphor

jokes.text: Your teeth? Yes, I saw them from outside.
jokes.setup: Ross asks Rachel if she notices anything different
jokes.punchline: Rachel claims she could see his teeth from outside the building
jokes.explanation: Absurd escalation suggesting supernatural whiteness, very quotable

jokes.text: I am proud of all my friends today.
jokes.setup: Rachel gets promoted due to gossip, Ross has ridiculous teeth
jokes.punchline: Monica sarcastically celebrates their 'achievements'
jokes.explanation: Good sarcastic observation about the absurd situations

jokes.text: Hi, I'm Chandler, your live-in boyfriend.
jokes.setup: Monica expresses jealousy over Phoebe making out with Ralph Lauren
jokes.punchline: Chandler awkwardly reminds Monica of their relationship
jokes.explanation: Awkward relationship humor, Chandler's insecurity showing

jokes.text: Well, I am no woman, but that is one tasty dish.
jokes.setup: Monica asks Chandler to look at Ralph Lauren photo
jokes.punchline: Chandler awkwardly overcompensates by using feminine language to describe Ralph
jokes.explanation: Funny gender role confusion, Chandler trying too hard to relate

jokes.text: Oh, wait. 'Ooh, Phoebe, I love you. Kiss me, please.'
jokes.setup: Phoebe is asked to identify Ralph Lauren
jokes.punchline: She demonstrates by imitating his voice during their makeout session
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe oversharing, funny way to 'identify' someone

jokes.text: He's young, and he's got long hair and a beard and a Hacky Sack...
jokes.setup: Phoebe describes the man she thought was Ralph Lauren
jokes.punchline: Her description reveals someone completely unlike the real Ralph Lauren
jokes.explanation: Sets up the revelation that she was deceived, good specific details

jokes.text: Oh, my God. That's not Ralph Lauren. That's Kenny the copy guy.
jokes.setup: Phoebe describes young guy with hacky sack
jokes.punchline: Rachel realizes Phoebe was fooled by the copy room employee
jokes.explanation: Good revelation payoff, explains the absurd situation

jokes.text: Why would the copy guy say he's Ralph Lauren? To get you to make out with him. Oh.
jokes.setup: Phoebe asks why Kenny would lie
jokes.punchline: Rachel explains the obvious deception as Phoebe slowly gets it
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe naivety moment, predictable but character-consistent

jokes.text: Okay, so colors that don't work are blue, yellow, green, red, black, white, orange and purple.
jokes.setup: Monica is trying to find a color that makes Ross's teeth look less white
jokes.punchline: She lists literally every color as not working
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation showing the impossibility of fixing Ross's teeth problem

jokes.text: Oh, great. So all I need to do is get some new skin. Thank you.
jokes.setup: Monica suggests lighter skin would help his teeth look less bright
jokes.punchline: Ross sarcastically points out how impossible that suggestion is
jokes.explanation: Good sarcastic response showing Ross's frustration with unhelpful advice

jokes.text: We're not 13 anymore.
jokes.setup: Monica suggests putting makeup on Ross
jokes.punchline: Ross protests they're adults, implying makeup is juvenile
jokes.explanation: Shows Ross's masculine insecurity about makeup, fairly predictable

jokes.text: Half the guys out there have makeup on. What? Half the people... I mean... Just try it and see.
jokes.setup: Monica tries to convince Ross that men wearing makeup is normal
jokes.punchline: She realizes she misspoke and awkwardly tries to cover
jokes.explanation: Awkward recovery from accidentally revealing too much about Hollywood

jokes.text: No! Demon! Demon!
jokes.setup: Phoebe arrives asking Ross to put up flyers
jokes.punchline: Ross screams and hides because his teeth are so white they glow
jokes.explanation: Great physical comedy moment, escalates the teeth problem to supernatural levels

jokes.text: In fact, we're two sachets away from becoming a lesbian couple.
jokes.setup: Chandler complains about how girlie his day has been
jokes.punchline: He suggests they're almost at lesbian levels of femininity
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation of masculine anxiety, specific prop reference

jokes.text: Go over to Joey's and drink some beer and hammer up some dry wall.
jokes.setup: Chandler wants to do something manly
jokes.punchline: His stereotypical idea of masculine activities
jokes.explanation: Sets up masculine stereotypes for Monica to deflate

jokes.text: When guys hang out, they don't just drink beer and hammer up dry wall.
jokes.setup: Chandler lists stereotypical guy activities
jokes.punchline: Monica points out that's not actually what men do
jokes.explanation: Good reality check on gender stereotypes, sets up Monica's reversal

jokes.text: When girls hang out, we don't have pillow fights in our underwear. I'm sorry. We do. We do. I don't know why I said that.
jokes.setup: Monica debunks gender stereotypes about women
jokes.punchline: She immediately reverses herself and admits the stereotype is true
jokes.explanation: Excellent self-correction joke, subverts expectation then subverts again

jokes.text: Come on in. We're knitting potholders.
jokes.setup: Chandler comes over expecting manly activities
jokes.punchline: Joey is doing the most stereotypically feminine craft possible
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic contrast to Chandler's expectations, great timing

jokes.text: No, thanks, Josephine.
jokes.setup: Joey invites Chandler to knit
jokes.punchline: Chandler sarcastically feminizes Joey's name
jokes.explanation: Good callback to Joey's feminization, economical insult

jokes.text: Oh, my God. Where are all the men?
jokes.setup: Chandler finds Joey and Ross both engaged in feminine activities
jokes.punchline: His existential crisis about the disappearance of masculinity
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of Chandler's masculine anxiety crisis

jokes.text: Only one keycard was used to access the copy machine yesterday during lunch, and that keycard belonged to you, Rachel.
jokes.setup: Kim investigates the Ralph Lauren makeout story
jokes.punchline: Her detective work reveals Rachel was the only one in the copy room
jokes.explanation: Good escalation creating new problem for Rachel, workplace detective work

jokes.text: I don't even know how to use my keycard.
jokes.setup: Rachel denies using her keycard
jokes.punchline: She admits she doesn't know how to use basic work equipment
jokes.explanation: Reveals Rachel's work incompetence, makes her denial less convincing

jokes.text: You could cut the sexual tension in here with a knife.
jokes.setup: Kim and Ralph Lauren have an awkward elevator encounter
jokes.punchline: Kim misreads the awkwardness as sexual tension
jokes.explanation: Kim's complete misreading of the situation, ironic given the real awkwardness

jokes.text: Ross keeping his mouth closed and just mumbling throughout the date
jokes.setup: Ross is on a date but can't open his mouth due to his bright teeth
jokes.punchline: He spends the entire date mumbling and being mysterious
jokes.explanation: Great visual comedy showing Ross trying to hide his teeth problem

jokes.text: So if you sear the stems of the flowers first in a frying pan, your arrangement will look fresh much longer.
jokes.setup: Joey has become increasingly domesticated
jokes.punchline: He's now giving sophisticated flower arranging tips
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation of Joey's feminization, very specific domestic knowledge

jokes.text: Aw. I love birds.
jokes.setup: Monica offers to teach Joey to make a bird feeder
jokes.punchline: Joey's sweet, feminine response about loving birds
jokes.explanation: Continues Joey's feminization arc, sweet contrast to his usual personality

jokes.text: And that happens to be a picture by a famous artist of a famous baby.
jokes.setup: Chandler criticizes Joey's feminine decorating
jokes.punchline: Joey still misunderstands the Anne Geddes situation
jokes.explanation: Callback showing Joey learned the wrong lesson, still confused about art

jokes.text: Oh, my God. I'm a woman.
jokes.setup: Chandler points out Joey's emotional, feminine responses
jokes.punchline: Joey has his horrifying realization about his transformation
jokes.explanation: Perfect payoff to Joey's feminization arc, genuine character moment

jokes.text: What if Kenny hired that Ralph guy to be the pretty front man, huh? Did she ever think of that?
jokes.setup: Rachel can't believe anyone would confuse Kenny with Ralph Lauren
jokes.punchline: Chandler creates elaborate conspiracy theory to justify the confusion
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly absurd conspiracy theory, perfect Chandler overthinking

jokes.text: Sleep with Ralph Lauren. I'm not gonna sleep with Ralph Lauren. I mean, I could, but I wouldn't.
jokes.setup: Phoebe suggests solving Rachel's work problem
jokes.punchline: Rachel's conflicted response about her theoretical ability vs willingness
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Rachel's confidence vs morals conflict

jokes.text: Ooh. Sleep with Kenny.
jokes.setup: Rachel rejects sleeping with Ralph Lauren
jokes.punchline: Phoebe immediately suggests the copy guy as alternative
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe logic, treating sex as solution to work problems

jokes.text: What's the matter with you? What's the matter with me? You've got a black light. It's 1999.
jokes.setup: Hillary asks what's wrong with Ross
jokes.punchline: Ross deflects by criticizing her outdated black light
jokes.explanation: Great deflection tactic and time-specific reference, good Ross neurotic response

jokes.text: And you will never get promoted, especially not above Kim, who is an integral cog in the Ralph Lauren machine.
jokes.setup: Rachel makes up fake breakup speech from Ralph
jokes.punchline: She goes overboard praising Kim to make the lie believable
jokes.explanation: Rachel's desperation leading to over-the-top flattery of Kim

jokes.text: He just gave you the coldest look I've ever seen. It's like he hates you.
jokes.setup: Ralph Lauren and Rachel have normal professional interaction
jokes.punchline: Kim interprets normal business demeanor as evidence of romantic drama
jokes.explanation: Kim's tendency to see drama where none exists, misreads professional distance

jokes.text: You and Ralph? Kenny the copy boy.
jokes.setup: Rachel asks if Kim has also been through romantic drama
jokes.punchline: Kim admits to affair with lowly copy room employee
jokes.explanation: Nice callback revealing Kim's hypocrisy and Kenny's success rate

jokes.text: Joey, do you want me to put it all in your room? Okay.
jokes.setup: Joey tries to maintain masculine living room but keeps requesting feminine items
jokes.punchline: He finally admits he wants all the girlie stuff in his room
jokes.explanation: Perfect payoff to Joey's internal conflict between wanting to be masculine and liking feminine things

tmdb_overview: Ross over-whitens his teeth. Rachel uses gossip strategically at work. Chandler worries the apartment became too feminine.
